race.description: Ray White Ipswich Incentive Sprint Series Heat Hcp (C1)
race.comment: STRIKE WEAPON (3) has a solid record over this trip with a win and a second from two attempts and is drawn to be able to sit up on speed from the inside alley. Will be rock-hard fit for this and gets Maloney on board. Sure to give backers a sight. SPIRIT OF BARTY (10) is yet to miss a drum in three career outings and looks to have plenty of upside. Strikes a contest that has been crippled by scratchings and has to be included in calculations. JADA ROSE (11) showed a bit winning here on debut and Lloyd retains the ride. Can go back-to-back to start the career. BAKED (8) best of the rest out of the Gollan camp.
